dev.jeka.core.api.file

Class JkPathTreeSet

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkPathTreeSet

  • public final class JkPathTreeSet
extends java.lang.Object
    See JkAbstractPathTree.getRoot()

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      JkPathTreeSet and(JkPathTree... trees)
      Creates a JkPathTreeSet which is a concatenation of this JkPathTreeSet and the JkPathTree array passed as parameter.
      JkPathTreeSet and(JkPathTreeSet... otherDirSets)
      Creates a JkPathTreeSet which is a concatenation of this JkPathTreeSet and the JkPathTreeSet array passed as parameter.
      JkPathTreeSet and(java.nio.file.Path... folders)
      Creates a JkPathTreeSet which is a concatenation of this JkPathTreeSet and the folder array passed as parameter.
      JkPathTreeSet andMatcher(java.nio.file.PathMatcher matcher)
      Creates a JkPathTree which is a copy of this JkPathTree augmented with the specified JkPathMatcher
      java.lang.String checksum(java.lang.String algorithm) 
      boolean containFiles() 
      JkPathTreeSet copyTo(java.nio.file.Path dir, java.nio.file.CopyOption... copyOptions)
      Copies the content of all trees involved in this set.
      int count(int max, boolean includeFolder)
      See JkAbstractPathTree.count(int, boolean)
      boolean equals(java.lang.Object obj) 
      java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getExistingFiles(java.lang.String relativePath)
      Returns a list of existing files having the specified relative path to its JkPathTree root.
      java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getFiles()
      Returns a concatenation of files for all trees involved in this set.
      java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getRelativeFiles()
      Returns a concatenation of relative paths for all trees involved in this set.
      java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getRootDirsOrZipFiles()
      Returns root dir or zip file for each JkPathTree tree involved in this JkPathTreeSet.
      int hashCode() 
      boolean hasNoExistingRoot()
      Returns true if no tree of this set has an existing baseTree.
      JkPathTreeSet mergeDuplicateRoots()
      Merges trees having same root by comparing their respective matcher.
      static JkPathTreeSet of(java.lang.Iterable<JkPathTree> dirs)
      Creates a JkPathTreeSet from an iterable of JkPathTree.
      static JkPathTreeSet of(JkPathTree... trees)
      Creates a JkPathTreeSet to an array of JkPathTree.
      static JkPathTreeSet ofEmpty()
      Creates an empty JkPathTreeSet.
      static JkPathTreeSet ofRoots(java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> paths)
      Creates a JkPathTreeSet from a JkPathSequence.
      static JkPathTreeSet ofRoots(java.nio.file.Path... folders)
      Creates a JkPathTreeSet from an array of folder.
      static JkPathTreeSet ofRoots(java.lang.String folder, java.lang.String... folders)
      Creates a JkPathTreeSet from an array of folder paths.
      JkPathTreeSet resolvedTo(java.nio.file.Path newRoot) 
      java.util.List<JkPathTree> toList()
      Returns JkPathTree instances constituting this JkPathTreeSet.
      java.lang.String toString() 
      void watch(long millis, java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean run, java.util.function.Consumer<java.util.List<JkAbstractPathTree.FileChange>> fileChangeConsumer)
      Same as JkAbstractPathTree.watch(long, AtomicBoolean, Consumer) but acting on this full path tree set.
      void watch(long millis, java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean run, java.lang.Runnable runnable)
      Same as watch(long, AtomicBoolean, Consumer) but just triggering a consumer on file changes.
      void watch(long millis, java.lang.Runnable runnable)
      Same as watch(long, AtomicBoolean, Runnable) but running indefinitely.
      JkPathTreeSet withMatcher(java.nio.file.PathMatcher matcher)
      Creates a JkPathTree which is a copy of this JkPathTreeSet replacing matcher by the specified one.
      JkPathTreeSet zipTo(java.nio.file.Path dir)
      Zips the content of all trees involved in this set.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, finalize, getClass, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkPathTreeSet of(java.lang.Iterable<JkPathTree> dirs)
        Creates a JkPathTreeSet from an iterable of JkPathTree.

      • ofEmpty

        public static JkPathTreeSet ofEmpty()
        Creates an empty JkPathTreeSet.

      • of

        public static JkPathTreeSet of(JkPathTree... trees)
        Creates a JkPathTreeSet to an array of JkPathTree.

      • ofRoots

        public static JkPathTreeSet ofRoots(java.nio.file.Path... folders)
        Creates a JkPathTreeSet from an array of folder.

      • ofRoots

        public static JkPathTreeSet ofRoots(java.lang.String folder,
                                    java.lang.String... folders)
        Creates a JkPathTreeSet from an array of folder paths.
        Parameters:
        folders - the array of folder paths
        Returns:
        the JkPathTreeSet created from the folder paths

      • ofRoots

        public static JkPathTreeSet ofRoots(java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> paths)
        Creates a JkPathTreeSet from a JkPathSequence.

      • and

        public JkPathTreeSet and(JkPathTree... trees)
        Creates a JkPathTreeSet which is a concatenation of this JkPathTreeSet and the JkPathTree array passed as parameter.

      • and

        public JkPathTreeSet and(java.nio.file.Path... folders)
        Creates a JkPathTreeSet which is a concatenation of this JkPathTreeSet and the folder array passed as parameter.

      • and

        public JkPathTreeSet and(JkPathTreeSet... otherDirSets)
        Creates a JkPathTreeSet which is a concatenation of this JkPathTreeSet and the JkPathTreeSet array passed as parameter.

      • andMatcher

        public JkPathTreeSet andMatcher(java.nio.file.PathMatcher matcher)
        Creates a JkPathTree which is a copy of this JkPathTree augmented with the specified JkPathMatcher

      • withMatcher

        public JkPathTreeSet withMatcher(java.nio.file.PathMatcher matcher)
        Creates a JkPathTree which is a copy of this JkPathTreeSet replacing matcher by the specified one.

      • getFiles

        public java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getFiles()
        Returns a concatenation of files for all trees involved in this set.

      • getRelativeFiles

        public java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getRelativeFiles()
        Returns a concatenation of relative paths for all trees involved in this set.

      • getExistingFiles

        public java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getExistingFiles(java.lang.String relativePath)
        Returns a list of existing files having the specified relative path to its JkPathTree root.

      • zipTo

        public JkPathTreeSet zipTo(java.nio.file.Path dir)
        Zips the content of all trees involved in this set.

      • copyTo

        public JkPathTreeSet copyTo(java.nio.file.Path dir,
                            java.nio.file.CopyOption... copyOptions)
        Copies the content of all trees involved in this set.

      • toList

        public java.util.List<JkPathTree> toList()
        Returns JkPathTree instances constituting this JkPathTreeSet.

      • getRootDirsOrZipFiles

        public java.util.List<java.nio.file.Path> getRootDirsOrZipFiles()
        Returns root dir or zip file for each JkPathTree tree involved in this JkPathTreeSet.

      • hasNoExistingRoot

        public boolean hasNoExistingRoot()
        Returns true if no tree of this set has an existing baseTree.

      • resolvedTo

        public JkPathTreeSet resolvedTo(java.nio.file.Path newRoot)
        See Also:
        JkAbstractPathTree.resolvedTo(Path)

                 boolean includeFolder)
        See JkAbstractPathTree.count(int, boolean)

      • containFiles

        public boolean containFiles()

      • mergeDuplicateRoots

        public JkPathTreeSet mergeDuplicateRoots()
        Merges trees having same root by comparing their respective matcher.

      • watch

        public void watch(long millis,
                  java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean run,
                  java.util.function.Consumer<java.util.List<JkAbstractPathTree.FileChange>> fileChangeConsumer)
        Same as JkAbstractPathTree.watch(long, AtomicBoolean, Consumer) but acting on this full path tree set.

      • watch

        public void watch(long millis,
                  java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean run,
                  java.lang.Runnable runnable)
        Same as watch(long, AtomicBoolean, Consumer) but just triggering a consumer on file changes.

      • watch

        public void watch(long millis,
                  java.lang.Runnable runnable)
        Same as watch(long, AtomicBoolean, Runnable) but running indefinitely.
